policyStatement: Checksum manifests record byte identity and release evidence only; this template does not implement signing and does not claim public beta readiness.

release.ciRunUrl: <required: CI run URL or release-runner build record>

artifacts.name: <required: artifact file name>
artifacts.class: <required: binary, archive, package, mobile-package, service-script, checksum-manifest, signature-metadata, release-notes, or rollback>
artifacts.checksumEvidence: <required: sha256sum, shasum -a 256, Get-FileHash, certutil -hashfile, openssl dgst -sha256, CI artifact output, or build record evidence for the exact file>
artifacts.signer: <required: signer identity/key id, or unsigned reason>
artifacts.signingTool: <required: signing tool/status for signed artifacts, or unsigned/source-local status evidence>
artifacts.signatureVerificationEvidence: <required: verification command output/status for signed artifacts, or unsigned/source-local evidence>
artifacts.manualChannelReason: <required when unsigned-manual-runner; otherwise state not applicable>
